ACGME OBGYN Residency Data

Source: R/acgme.R
acgme.Rd

Information about Obstetricians and Gynecologists (OBGYN) residency programs accredited by the Accreditation Council for Graduate Medical Education (ACGME).

Usage

acgme

Format

A data frame with 142 columns:

program_name

Name of the ACGME-accredited OBGYN residency program.

address

Street address of the program.

zip

ZIP code of the program.

city

City where the program is located.

state

State where the program is located.

website

Program website URL.

phone

Program contact phone number.

program_code

ACGME program code.

sponsoring_institution_code

ACGME code for the sponsoring institution.

sponsoring_institution_name

Name of the sponsoring institution.

original_accreditation_date

Date of original ACGME accreditation.

accreditation_status

Current accreditation status.

director_name

Name of the program director.

director_date_appointed

Date the program director was appointed.

coordinator_name_1

Name of the first program coordinator.

coordinator_phone_1

Phone number of the first program coordinator.

coordinator_email_1

Email address of the first program coordinator.

participation_site_code_1

ACGME code for participation site 1.

participation_site_name_1

Name of participation site 1.

rotation_required_1

Whether rotation at site 1 is required.

rotation_months_y1_1

Months at site 1 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_1

Months at site 1 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_1

Months at site 1 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_1

Months at site 1 during year 4.

participation_site_code_2

ACGME code for participation site 2.

participation_site_name_2

Name of participation site 2.

rotation_required_2

Whether rotation at site 2 is required.

rotation_months_y1_2

Months at site 2 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_2

Months at site 2 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_2

Months at site 2 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_2

Months at site 2 during year 4.

participation_site_code_3

ACGME code for participation site 3.

participation_site_name_3

Name of participation site 3.

rotation_required_3

Whether rotation at site 3 is required.

rotation_months_y1_3

Months at site 3 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_3

Months at site 3 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_3

Months at site 3 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_3

Months at site 3 during year 4.

participation_site_code_4

ACGME code for participation site 4.

participation_site_name_4

Name of participation site 4.

rotation_required_4

Whether rotation at site 4 is required.

rotation_months_y1_4

Months at site 4 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_4

Months at site 4 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_4

Months at site 4 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_4

Months at site 4 during year 4.

participation_site_code_5

ACGME code for participation site 5.

participation_site_name_5

Name of participation site 5.

rotation_required_5

Whether rotation at site 5 is required.

rotation_months_y1_5

Months at site 5 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_5

Months at site 5 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_5

Months at site 5 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_5

Months at site 5 during year 4.

participation_site_code_6

ACGME code for participation site 6.

rotation_required_6

Whether rotation at site 6 is required.

rotation_months_y1_6

Months at site 6 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_6

Months at site 6 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_6

Months at site 6 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_6

Months at site 6 during year 4.

participation_site_code_7

ACGME code for participation site 7.

participation_site_name_7

Name of participation site 7.

rotation_required_7

Whether rotation at site 7 is required.

rotation_months_y1_7

Months at site 7 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_7

Months at site 7 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_7

Months at site 7 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_7

Months at site 7 during year 4.

participation_site_code_8

ACGME code for participation site 8.

participation_site_name_8

Name of participation site 8.

rotation_required_8

Whether rotation at site 8 is required.

rotation_months_y1_8

Months at site 8 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_8

Months at site 8 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_8

Months at site 8 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_8

Months at site 8 during year 4.

participation_site_code_9

ACGME code for participation site 9.

participation_site_name_9

Name of participation site 9.

rotation_required_9

Whether rotation at site 9 is required.

rotation_months_y1_9

Months at site 9 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_9

Months at site 9 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_9

Months at site 9 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_9

Months at site 9 during year 4.

participation_site_code_10

ACGME code for participation site 10.

participation_site_name_10

Name of participation site 10.

rotation_required_10

Whether rotation at site 10 is required.

rotation_months_y1_10

Months at site 10 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_10

Months at site 10 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_10

Months at site 10 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_10

Months at site 10 during year 4.

participation_site_code_11

ACGME code for participation site 11.

participation_site_name_11

Name of participation site 11.

rotation_required_11

Whether rotation at site 11 is required.

rotation_months_y1_11

Months at site 11 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_11

Months at site 11 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_11

Months at site 11 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_11

Months at site 11 during year 4.

participation_site_code_12

ACGME code for participation site 12.

participation_site_name_12

Name of participation site 12.

rotation_required_12

Whether rotation at site 12 is required.

rotation_months_y1_12

Months at site 12 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_12

Months at site 12 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_12

Months at site 12 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_12

Months at site 12 during year 4.

participation_site_code_13

ACGME code for participation site 13.

participation_site_name_13

Name of participation site 13.

rotation_required_13

Whether rotation at site 13 is required.

rotation_months_y1_13

Months at site 13 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_13

Months at site 13 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_13

Months at site 13 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_13

Months at site 13 during year 4.

participation_site_code_14

ACGME code for participation site 14.

participation_site_name_14

Name of participation site 14.

rotation_required_14

Whether rotation at site 14 is required.

rotation_months_y1_14

Months at site 14 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_14

Months at site 14 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_14

Months at site 14 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_14

Months at site 14 during year 4.

participation_site_code_15

ACGME code for participation site 15.

participation_site_name_15

Name of participation site 15.

rotation_required_15

Whether rotation at site 15 is required.

rotation_months_y1_15

Months at site 15 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_15

Months at site 15 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_15

Months at site 15 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_15

Months at site 15 during year 4.

participation_site_code_16

ACGME code for participation site 16.

participation_site_name_16

Name of participation site 16.

rotation_required_16

Whether rotation at site 16 is required.

rotation_months_y1_16

Months at site 16 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_16

Months at site 16 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_16

Months at site 16 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_16

Months at site 16 during year 4.

participation_site_code_17

ACGME code for participation site 17.

participation_site_name_17

Name of participation site 17.

rotation_required_17

Whether rotation at site 17 is required.

rotation_months_y1_17

Months at site 17 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_17

Months at site 17 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_17

Months at site 17 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_17

Months at site 17 during year 4.

participation_site_code_18

ACGME code for participation site 18.

participation_site_name_18

Name of participation site 18.

rotation_required_18

Whether rotation at site 18 is required.

rotation_months_y1_18

Months at site 18 during year 1.

rotation_months_y2_18

Months at site 18 during year 2.

rotation_months_y3_18

Months at site 18 during year 3.

rotation_months_y4_18

Months at site 18 during year 4.

Source

https://apps.acgme.org/ads/Public/Programs/Search

See also

Other datasets: ACOG_Districts, cityStateToLatLong, fips, taxonomy

Examples

data(acgme)
print(acgme[1:3, 1:5])
#> # A tibble: 3 × 5
#>   program_name                                         address zip   city  state
#>   <chr>                                                <chr>   <chr> <chr> <chr>
#> 1 University of Alabama Medical Center Program         "Unive… 35249 Birm… Alab…
#> 2 USA Health Program                                   "Unive… 36604 Mobi… Alab…
#> 3 University of Arizona College of Medicine-Phoenix P… "Banne… 85006 Phoe… Ariz…
